phases.phase-1-C: Prod manual smoke — 3 most critical flows (go-live gate)
phases.phase-2-A: High-priority e2e flows (trials, cancel/pause/resume, dunning, refund/dispute, D4 authorized)
phases.phase-3-A: Important e2e flows (promo, sponsorship, overrides, cache, admin ops, exchange rate, D1..D8 secondary)
phases.phase-3-BD: Staging smoke for Phase 3 + Sentry filter tuning
phases.phase-4: Observability + runbooks + dashboards + docs + CI tuning + coverage report

tasks.title: Fix apps/api/.env.test credentials (hospeda_user:hospeda_pass)
tasks.notes: Current .env.test uses hospeda:hospeda which does not match the docker postgres user. Without this, every e2e test fails connection.

tasks.title: Push Drizzle schema to hospeda_test database
tasks.notes: pnpm --filter @repo/db db:push with TEST_DB_URL pointing at hospeda_test. Creates all billing tables in the test DB.

tasks.title: Apply postgres-extras (triggers, MVs, JSONB CHECKs) to hospeda_test
tasks.notes: Run packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh against hospeda_test. Required by ADR-017 — Drizzle push alone is incomplete.

tasks.title: Minimal seed: 2 plans (cheap + expensive) with monthly + annual prices
tasks.notes: Seed billing_plans (UUID id) + billing_prices for monthly + annual. Used by every e2e flow. Idempotent — re-runnable.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/mp-stub.ts (createMercadoPagoAdapter stub)
tasks.notes: Stub factory returning canned responses for preferences.create(), subscriptions.update(), payments.get(), customers.create(), preapproval.* operations. Configurable per-test via setMpStubResponse() helper.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-fixtures.ts
tasks.notes: Reusable fixture data: sample MP webhook payloads (idempotent, signed), preference responses, payment objects, customer records. Mirrors the shape of real MP responses captured from sandbox.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-factories.ts (DB factories)
tasks.notes: createTestUser, createTestCustomer, createTestSubscription, createTestAddon — generate clean DB rows with predictable IDs. Reset helper for between-test cleanup.

tasks.title: Smoke e2e test: GET /billing/plans returns seeded plans
tasks.notes: Single-test sanity check that infra works end-to-end before writing real flows. If this fails, fix infra before proceeding.

tasks.title: E2E: annual checkout flow (preference → payment.approved webhook → subscription active)
tasks.notes: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/annual-checkout.test.ts. Validates entitlements load after activation.

tasks.title: E2E: monthly checkout flow (preapproval setup → first charge → subscription active)
tasks.notes: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/monthly-checkout.test.ts. Preapproval-based recurring flow distinct from one-time annual.

tasks.title: E2E: plan upgrade with delta calculation
tasks.notes: plan-upgrade.test.ts. Active subscription on cheap plan → upgrade to expensive → assert prorated delta charge + entitlements updated immediately.

tasks.title: E2E: plan downgrade scheduling (queued for next cycle)
tasks.notes: plan-downgrade.test.ts. Active on expensive → schedule downgrade → assert pending change row + entitlements unchanged until cycle boundary.

tasks.title: E2E: downgrade cron execution applies queued change
tasks.notes: downgrade-cron.test.ts. Setup queued downgrade → advance virtual clock → trigger cron → assert plan flipped + entitlements recalculated + entitlement cache invalidated.

tasks.title: E2E: addon one-time purchase
tasks.notes: addon-purchase.test.ts. Preference → payment.approved → addon credit granted + JSONB CHECK constraint validated (no schema drift).

tasks.title: E2E: webhook idempotency (duplicate event ID)
tasks.notes: webhook-idempotency.test.ts. POST same MP webhook event twice → second call is no-op, no duplicate subscription/payment row, response 200.

tasks.title: E2E: webhook signature validation rejects unsigned/bad-sig
tasks.notes: webhook-signature.test.ts. Send webhook without signature, with bad signature, with replayed timestamp → all rejected 401 + Sentry event captured.

tasks.title: E2E: failed payment webhook handler
tasks.notes: webhook-failed-payment.test.ts. payment.rejected webhook → subscription flips to past_due, dunning queue entry created, user notification dispatched.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription activation — annual + monthly post-payment
tasks.notes: subscription-activation.test.ts. Covers both flows: payment.approved → subscription row active + current_period_end set correctly + cache primed.

tasks.title: E2E: entitlement load post-activation (covers SPEC-141 unit gap)
tasks.notes: entitlement-load.test.ts. Closes the structural gap from SPEC-141 — proves real activation produces real entitlements that real /entitlements/* endpoints return correctly.

tasks.title: Author docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md — Phase 1 sections + MP test users
tasks.notes: Steps for each Phase 1 flow against MP sandbox, with per-user assignment (clean-state vs persisted). Includes pass/fail recording grid.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 1 staging smokes (12 flows) and record results
tasks.notes: User executes the staging checklist end-to-end against real MP sandbox. Sign-off recorded in checklist.

tasks.title: Author docs/prod-smoke-checklist.md + rollback procedure
tasks.notes: Abbreviated checklist for 3 prod flows (annual + monthly + addon). Rollback procedure documented for each: how to refund/cancel/revert if smoke fails.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 1 prod smokes (annual + monthly + addon, small charges)
tasks.notes: User executes prod checklist with real production credentials and small charges. This is the GO-LIVE GATE for real-money charging.

tasks.title: E2E: trial activation
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (activation case). User signs up with eligible plan → trial subscription row + trial_ends_at set + entitlements active.

tasks.title: E2E: trial expiration cron
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (expiration case). Advance clock past trial_ends_at → cron downgrades to free + entitlements revoked + user notified.

tasks.title: E2E: trial → paid conversion before expiration
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (conversion case). Mid-trial checkout → paid subscription active + trial_ends_at cleared + no double-billing.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription cancel
tasks.notes: subscription-cancel.test.ts. Active → cancel → access continues until current_period_end + no further billing + MP preapproval paused.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription pause
tasks.notes: subscription-pause-resume.test.ts (pause case). Active → pause → entitlements revoked + MP preapproval paused + paused_at set.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription resume
tasks.notes: subscription-pause-resume.test.ts (resume case). Paused → resume → entitlements restored + MP preapproval reactivated + next-charge scheduled.

tasks.title: E2E: dunning cron retries failed payments and ages out
tasks.notes: dunning-cron.test.ts. past_due subscription → cron retries with exponential backoff → after N failures, subscription canceled + user notified.

tasks.title: E2E: addon expiration cron
tasks.notes: addon-expiration-cron.test.ts. addon past expires_at → cron revokes credit + JSONB metadata updated + cache invalidated.

tasks.title: E2E: addon cancel + subscription price recalc
tasks.notes: addon-cancel-recalc.test.ts. Subscription with addon → cancel addon → next-period charge amount recalculated correctly.

tasks.title: E2E: authorized payment (D4 flow — pre-authorize then capture)
tasks.notes: authorized-payment.test.ts. Pre-authorize on signup → capture on conversion → assert no double-charge + MP authorization-id tracked.

tasks.title: E2E: refund flow
tasks.notes: refund.test.ts. Active subscription → refund payment via admin → MP refund webhook → payment row flipped + entitlements end-dated.

tasks.title: E2E: dispute flow (chargeback webhook)
tasks.notes: dispute.test.ts. MP chargeback webhook → subscription frozen + admin notified + Sentry event captured.

tasks.title: Append Phase 2 sections to docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md
tasks.notes: Trial lifecycle, cancel/pause/resume, dunning, addon expiry/cancel, authorized payment, refund, dispute sections.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 2 staging smokes and record results
tasks.notes: Real MP sandbox execution of 12 Phase 2 flows. Sign-off recorded.

tasks.title: E2E: promo code apply / validate / expire
tasks.notes: promo-code.test.ts. Valid code applies discount, expired code rejected, max-uses code rejected after limit.

tasks.title: E2E: sponsorship grant / revoke
tasks.notes: sponsorship.test.ts. Sponsor grants plan to user → entitlements active without payment → revoke → entitlements end-dated.

tasks.title: E2E: customer override apply / expire
tasks.notes: customer-override.test.ts. Admin sets per-customer entitlement override → applies on entitlement read → expire date → reverts to plan default.

tasks.title: E2E: entitlement cache hit/miss/invalidation/TTL
tasks.notes: entitlement-cache.test.ts. Verify Redis cache hits, manual invalidation on subscription change, TTL boundary, fall-through to DB on miss.

tasks.title: E2E: admin billing ops (list / customer detail / subscription manual ops / addon manual ops)
tasks.notes: admin-billing-ops.test.ts. /api/v1/admin/billing/* endpoints validated end-to-end with admin auth + permissions.

tasks.title: E2E: exchange rate cron
tasks.notes: exchange-rate-cron.test.ts. Cron fetches latest ARS/USD/BRL → updates billing_exchange_rates row → next checkout uses fresh rate.

tasks.title: E2E: secondary auth/redirect/cancel flows (D1..D8)
tasks.notes: auth-redirect-cancel-flows.test.ts. Eight smaller flows: success-redirect, failure-redirect, pending-redirect, cancel-from-MP, browser-back-during-checkout, double-submit, session-expired-during-checkout, anonymous-checkout-attempt.

tasks.title: Append Phase 3 sections to docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md
tasks.notes: Promo codes, sponsorship, overrides, cache, admin ops, exchange rate, D1..D8 sections.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 3 staging smokes and record results
tasks.notes: Real MP sandbox execution. Sign-off recorded.

tasks.title: Sentry filter tuning for promo/sponsorship/override noise
tasks.notes: Phase 3 flows produce expected errors (expired codes, revoked sponsorships). Filter these out of Sentry to avoid alert fatigue.

tasks.title: Author docs/billing-runbooks.md
tasks.notes: Operational runbooks: failed-webhook-handler triage, MP signature failure response, cron failure recovery, dunning-cron stuck recovery, refund procedure, dispute procedure, manual subscription rescue.

tasks.title: Sentry alerts: failed-payment webhook handler + MP signature validation failure
tasks.notes: Two alerts. Threshold + notification target documented. Go-live gate requirement.

tasks.title: Sentry alerts: cron job failure + dunning cron failure
tasks.notes: Two alerts. Threshold + notification target documented. Go-live gate requirement.

tasks.title: Billing health dashboard (Sentry / metrics view)
tasks.notes: Dashboard surfacing active subscriptions, MRR, webhook error rate, cron last-run timestamps, signature failures (24h).

tasks.title: Author docs/mp-test-cards-reference.md
tasks.notes: MP-published test card numbers + cvv + expiry combos for approve/reject/pending/dispute outcomes. Referenced by smoke checklists.

tasks.title: Author docs/e2e-infrastructure-design.md + docs/mp-stub-architecture.md
tasks.notes: Two design docs: overall e2e infra (test DB, fixtures, factories) + the mp-stub contract (what it stubs, what it does not). For future maintainers.

tasks.title: Add CLAUDE.md rule: billing-touching PR must execute manual smoke checklist
tasks.notes: Rule added to root CLAUDE.md (or relevant section). Per engram #532 decision Q1.

tasks.title: Coverage verification: 80% line coverage on billing services/routes/webhooks
tasks.notes: Run vitest --coverage scoped to apps/api/src/services/*billing*, apps/api/src/routes/billing/*, apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/*. Gap analysis if below 80%. Document any /* istanbul ignore */ exceptions in this task.

tasks.title: CI tuning for billing e2e (parallelism, time budget, isolation)
tasks.notes: Configure vitest project for billing e2e. Test isolation (DB transaction rollback per test or schema-per-test). Time budget for the suite. Surface in CI report.
